chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1279 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 06-11-2025 Mr. Bakhshan Khan Mahar, Advocate along with petitioner. Mr. Sheeraz Ahmed Fazal, Advocate for respondents-university. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G. **** Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the grievance of the petitioner in respect of prayer clause “A” of the petition is redressed and the petitioner would be satisfied and will not press the instant petition if the Vice Chancellor, Shah Abdul Latif University, Khairpur (respondent No.1) is directed to consider the case of the petitioner for grant of next grade/pay scale, as was granted to Mr. Yar Muhammad Wassan and Mr. Hakim Wassan, and furnish a compliance report to this Court through the Additional Registrar within 30 days. Accordingly, the instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
